","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NypoOEdaXoj1kkh05K31Z9/sKO7vELeVXyMhkPqVPKOw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8a6a421ca61342b3bbc7b3e14ac9d21e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709108&x-signature=wgSeBt0kOqKJbVcZwi4W5qzao4s%3D","user_id":"3290189249396589","user_name":"混乱大脑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3290189249396589","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602537612208770073","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌】【异兽流/变身流】【幕后黑手】【奥特曼】【绝对压制】
苏云穿越奥特宇宙，发现自己竟然变成了传说中的完全生命体——叶腐！
没有血条，没有痛觉，拥有无限进化的可能！
起初，他只是宇宙中一颗不起眼的白色球体。
直到贝利亚为了测试新武器，随手给了他一炮……
下一秒，一个免疫一切黑暗能量，反手轰飞贝利亚的恐怖存在诞生了！
赛罗：“我的究极光辉形态竟然被他一眼复制？”
塔尔塔洛斯：“在他的进化速度面前，阿布索留特一族简直像原始人！”
奥特之王：“快住手！千万不要攻击他！对他展现善意……那是唯一的活路！”
苏云看着瑟瑟发抖的全宇宙强者，无奈摊手：“我本来只想当个安静的乐器，是你们非要逼我当魔神的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1f601c0071a8a27739a7533ae2f1f8cf","author":"迷你奥利奥","author_id":"","book_id":"7602537612208770073","book_name":"奥特：开局变叶腐，光之国慌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602537655011639833","read_count":"23494","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"315235"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"157","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,无敌,开局,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1e346d9d0e6ff7185b93d7898f213442~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318111&x-signature=V2%2FBenGQiB2CjriEy0MeEdGObx8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6941259532","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"46"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322070151F10467939D9433D3F1B6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"
